list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat(dronedet): implement end-to-end drone detection and tracking pipeline
- Detection: Introduce `moe-hybrid` layered fusion (stabilization -> motion proposals -> tiny-specialist YOLO -> near/big-expert YOLO). Achieved 100% near-drone recall and successful detection of 3-5px hazy drones with 0.44 FP/frame. - Tracking: Implement camera-motion-compensated Kalman tracker with Hungarian association, coasting, and directedness-based clutter rejection. Maintained stable tracking over 91.4% of far drone frames and 100% for the landed drone. - Training Recipe: Resolve small-object (<10px) starvation in YOLO loss by separating tiny/large target training, inflating sub-10px labels to 24px, and using copy-paste augmentation with scale/haze jitter. - Documentation & Tools: Add comprehensive `REPORT.md`, evaluation matrices (`eval_val.md`, `eval_full.md`), trained experts (`yolo-ft-best.pt`, `yolo-ft5-best.pt`), and reproduction scripts (`python -m dronedet ...`).
Note: Current fine-tuned weights are scene-tuned to the 24s video; the pipeline architecture, harness, and training recipes are the primary transferable deliverables.

task.summary:
feat(dronedet): implement end-to-end drone detection and tracking pipeline
- Detection: Introduce `moe-hybrid` layered fusion (stabilization -> motion proposals -> tiny-specialist YOLO -> near/big-expert YOLO). Achieved 100% near-drone recall and successful detection of 3-5px hazy drones with 0.44 FP/frame. - Tracking: Implement camera-motion-compensated Kalman tracker with Hungarian association, coasting, and directedness-based clutter rejection. Maintained stable tracking over 91.4% of far drone frames and 100% for the landed drone. - Training Recipe: Resolve small-object (<10px) starvation in YOLO loss by separating tiny/large target training, inflating sub-10px labels to 24px, and using copy-paste augmentation with scale/haze jitter. - Documentation & Tools: Add comprehensive `REPORT.md`, evaluation matrices (`eval_val.md`, `eval_full.md`), trained experts (`yolo-ft-best.pt`, `yolo-ft5-best.pt`), and reproduction scripts (`python -m dronedet ...`).
Note: Current fine-tuned weights are scene-tuned to the 24s video; the pipeline architecture, harness, and training recipes are the primary transferable deliverables.

feat(dronedet): implement end-to-end drone detection and tracking pipeline
- Detection: Introduce `moe-hybrid` layered fusion (stabilization -> motion proposals -> tiny-specialist YOLO -> near/big-expert YOLO). Achieved 100% near-drone recall and successful detection of 3-5px hazy drones with 0.44 FP/frame. - Tracking: Implement camera-motion-compensated Kalman tracker with Hungarian association, coasting, and directedness-based clutter rejection. Maintained stable tracking over 91.4% of far drone frames and 100% for the landed drone. - Training Recipe: Resolve small-object (<10px) starvation in YOLO loss by separating tiny/large target training, inflating sub-10px labels to 24px, and using copy-paste augmentation with scale/haze jitter. - Documentation & Tools: Add comprehensive `REPORT.md`, evaluation matrices (`eval_val.md`, `eval_full.md`), trained experts (`yolo-ft-best.pt`, `yolo-ft5-best.pt`), and reproduction scripts (`python -m dronedet ...`).
Note: Current fine-tuned weights are scene-tuned to the 24s video; the pipeline architecture, harness, and training recipes are the primary transferable deliverables.

feat(dronedet): implement end-to-end drone detection and tracking pipeline
- Detection: Introduce `moe-hybrid` layered fusion (stabilization -> motion proposals -> tiny-specialist YOLO -> near/big-expert YOLO). Achieved 100% near-drone recall and successful detection of 3-5px hazy drones with 0.44 FP/frame. - Tracking: Implement camera-motion-compensated Kalman tracker with Hungarian association, coasting, and directedness-based clutter rejection. Maintained stable tracking over 91.4% of far drone frames and 100% for the landed drone. - Training Recipe: Resolve small-object (<10px) starvation in YOLO loss by separating tiny/large target training, inflating sub-10px labels to 24px, and using copy-paste augmentation with scale/haze jitter. - Documentation & Tools: Add comprehensive `REPORT.md`, evaluation matrices (`eval_val.md`, `eval_full.md`), trained experts (`yolo-ft-best.pt`, `yolo-ft5-best.pt`), and reproduction scripts (`python -m dronedet ...`).
Note: Current fine-tuned weights are scene-tuned to the 24s video; the pipeline architecture, harness, and training recipes are the primary transferable deliverables.

feat(dronedet): implement end-to-end drone detection and tracking pipeline
- Detection: Introduce `moe-hybrid` layered fusion (stabilization -> motion proposals -> tiny-specialist YOLO -> near/big-expert YOLO). Achieved 100% near-drone recall and successful detection of 3-5px hazy drones with 0.44 FP/frame. - Tracking: Implement camera-motion-compensated Kalman tracker with Hungarian association, coasting, and directedness-based clutter rejection. Maintained stable tracking over 91.4% of far drone frames and 100% for the landed drone. - Training Recipe: Resolve small-object (<10px) starvation in YOLO loss by separating tiny/large target training, inflating sub-10px labels to 24px, and using copy-paste augmentation with scale/haze jitter. - Documentation & Tools: Add comprehensive `REPORT.md`, evaluation matrices (`eval_val.md`, `eval_full.md`), trained experts (`yolo-ft-best.pt`, `yolo-ft5-best.pt`), and reproduction scripts (`python -m dronedet ...`).
Note: Current fine-tuned weights are scene-tuned to the 24s video; the pipeline architecture, harness, and training recipes are the primary transferable deliverables.

MESSAGE.value:
feat(dronedet): implement end-to-end drone detection and tracking pipeline
- Detection: Introduce `moe-hybrid` layered fusion (stabilization -> motion proposals -> tiny-specialist YOLO -> near/big-expert YOLO). Achieved 100% near-drone recall and successful detection of 3-5px hazy drones with 0.44 FP/frame. - Tracking: Implement camera-motion-compensated Kalman tracker with Hungarian association, coasting, and directedness-based clutter rejection. Maintained stable tracking over 91.4% of far drone frames and 100% for the landed drone. - Training Recipe: Resolve small-object (<10px) starvation in YOLO loss by separating tiny/large target training, inflating sub-10px labels to 24px, and using copy-paste augmentation with scale/haze jitter. - Documentation & Tools: Add comprehensive `REPORT.md`, evaluation matrices (`eval_val.md`, `eval_full.md`), trained experts (`yolo-ft-best.pt`, `yolo-ft5-best.pt`), and reproduction scripts (`python -m dronedet ...`).
Note: Current fine-tuned weights are scene-tuned to the 24s video; the pipeline architecture, harness, and training recipes are the primary transferable deliverables.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat(dronedet): implement end-to-end drone detection and tracking pipeline
- Detection: Introduce `moe-hybrid` layered fusion (stabilization -> motion proposals -> tiny-specialist YOLO -> near/big-expert YOLO). Achieved 100% near-drone recall and successful detection of 3-5px hazy drones with 0.44 FP/frame. - Tracking: Implement camera-motion-compensated Kalman tracker with Hungarian association, coasting, and directedness-based clutter rejection. Maintained stable tracking over 91.4% of far drone frames and 100% for the landed drone. - Training Recipe: Resolve small-object (<10px) starvation in YOLO loss by separating tiny/large target training, inflating sub-10px labels to 24px, and using copy-paste augmentation with scale/haze jitter. - Documentation & Tools: Add comprehensive `REPORT.md`, evaluation matrices (`eval_val.md`, `eval_full.md`), trained experts (`yolo-ft-best.pt`, `yolo-ft5-best.pt`), and reproduction scripts (`python -m dronedet ...`).
Note: Current fine-tuned weights are scene-tuned to the 24s video; the pipeline architecture, harness, and training recipes are the primary transferable deliverables.
